sentences.english: I can sleep until noon if no one wakes me up.
sentences.korean: 아무도 안 깨우면 정오까지 잘 수 있어.

sentences.english: I'm not really good at sleeping in, actually.
I tend to wake up early no matter what.
sentences.korean: 무슨 일이 있어도 일찍 일어나는 편이에요.

sentences.english: Even if I go to bed late, my body just wakes up.
I wish I could sleep in more, but I have a dog that wakes me up every morning at six.
sentences.korean: 더 늦잠 자고 싶지만 매일 아침 6시에 깨우는 개가 있어요.

sentences.english: He needs to go outside, so I have no choice.
sentences.korean: 밖에 나가야 해서 선택의 여지가 없어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
